name: Convert the Spire (Firefox Only)
description: YouTube Video Converter Extension - Firefox Exclusive

2.2.0: FIREFOX ONLY: Converted to Manifest V2 (Chrome MV3 blocks YouTube downloads)
Updated all browser API calls for Firefox compatibility
Extension now Firefox-exclusive due to Chrome Manifest V3 restrictions
2.2: Complete UI redesign with tabbed interface (Main, Debug Logs, Settings)
Enhanced debug logging system with export functionality
Improved error handling and retry logic
Better YouTube data extraction with comprehensive logging
Added Shorts support with proper metadata extraction
Enhanced thumbnail display and video selection interface
Comprehensive logging throughout popup.js and content.js
Local YouTube data extraction instead of external APIs
Added settings for max retries and retry delay
2.0: Complete rewrite using local YouTube data extraction
Added thumbnail display and video selection
Enhanced UI with better progress tracking

author: Convert the Spire Team
